title: 3D Interactive Portfolio
seoTitle: 3D Interactive Portfolio - Downloadable Premium Portfolio Template | Multiverse
metaDescription: A playful 3D-inspired portfolio with immersive visuals, interactive motion, and a modern experimental creator feel.
summary: A playful 3D-inspired portfolio with immersive visuals, interactive motion, and a modern experimental creator feel.
description: This portfolio template is designed for motion designers, creative developers, and digital artists who want a more interactive presentation with visual depth and a modern experimental tone.
audience: motion designers, digital artists, and creative technologists
prompt: Design a premium interactive portfolio with 3D-inspired visuals, motion-rich sections, experimental composition, and strong creative energy.
layoutNotes: The visual identity depends on motion and depth, so the composition should feel playful but still usable.
This template is suited for creators whose work benefits from a more experimental presentation.
responsiveNotes: Interactive surfaces collapse into simpler touch-friendly modules on mobile.
Visual depth remains part of the experience without hurting readability on smaller screens.

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>3D Interactive Portfolio</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Space+Grotesk:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=Outfit:wght@200;300;400;500;600;700;800;900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  *, *::before, *::after { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }

  :root {
    --bg: #0a0a0f;
    --bg-secondary: #12121a;
    --fg: #e8e8f0;
    --fg-muted: #8888a0;
    --accent: #6c5ce7;
    --accent-glow: #a29bfe;
    --accent-secondary: #00cec9;
    --accent-warm: #fd79a8;
    --card: #16162a;
    --card-hover: #1e1e38;
    --border: rgba(108, 92, 231, 0.2);
    --radius: 16px;
    --shadow-deep: 0 25px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.6), 0 10px 20px rgba(108,92,231,0.15);
    --shadow-float: 0 30px 80px rgba(0,0,0,0.5), 0 5px 20px rgba(108,92,231,0.2);
    --perspective: 1200px;
    --font-display: 'Outfit', sans-serif;
    --font-body: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif;
  }

  html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }

  body {
    font-family: var(--font-body);
    background: var(--bg);
    color: var(--fg);
    overflow-x: hidden;
    line-height: 1.6;
  }

  /* ── NAV ── */
  nav {
    position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; z-index: 1000;
    padding: 1rem 2rem;
    background: rgba(10,10,15,0.85);
    backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
    perspective: var(--perspective);
  }

  .nav-logo {
    font-family: var(--font-display);
    font-size: 1.6rem; font-weight: 800;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent), var(--accent-secondary));
    -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
    transform-style: preserve-3d;
    transition: transform 0.4s;
  }
  .nav-logo:hover { transform: rotateY(15deg) rotateX(-5deg); }

  .nav-links { display: flex; gap: 2rem; list-style: none; }
  .nav-links a {
    color: var(--fg-muted); text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.9rem;
    font-weight: 500; position: relative; transition: color 0.3s, transform 0.3s;
    transform-style: preserve-3d;
  }
  .nav-links a:hover {
    color: var(--accent-glow);
    transform: translateZ(10px);
  }
  .nav-links a::after {
    content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: -4px; left: 0;
    width: 0; height: 2px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--accent), var(--accent-secondary));
    transition: width 0.3s;
  }
  .nav-links a:hover::after { width: 100%; }

  .nav-toggle { display: none; background: none; border: none; cursor: pointer; }
  .nav-toggle span {
    display: block; width: 28px; height: 2px; margin: 6px 0;
    background: var(--fg); transition: 0.3s;
  }

  /* ── HERO ── */
  .hero {
    min-height: 100vh; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    position: relative; perspective: var(--perspective); overflow: hidden;
    padding: 6rem 2rem 4rem;
  }

  .hero-bg {
    position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: 0;
    background:
      radial-gradient(ellipse at 30% 20%, rgba(108,92,231,0.15) 0%, transparent 60%),
      radial-gradient(ellipse at 70% 80%, rgba(0,206,201,0.1) 0%, transparent 50%);
  }

  .hero-grid {
    position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: 0;
    background-image:
      linear-gradient(rgba(108,92,231,0.05) 1px, transparent 1px),
      linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(108,92,231,0.05) 1px, transparent 1px);
    background-size: 60px 60px;
    transform: perspective(500px) rotateX(60deg);
    transform-origin: center top;
    animation: gridScroll 20s linear infinite;
  }

  @keyframes gridScroll {
    0% { background-position: 0 0; }
    100% { background-position: 0 60px; }
  }

  .floating-shapes {
    position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: 1; pointer-events: none;
    perspective: 800px;
  }

  .float-shape {
    position: absolute; border: 2px solid; border-radius: 12px;
    opacity: 0.3; animation: float3d 8s ease-in-out infinite;
    transform-style: preserve-3d;
  }

  .float-shape:nth-child(1) {
    width: 80px; height: 80px; top: 15%; left: 10%;
    border-color: var(--accent); animation-delay: 0s;
    animation-duration: 7s;
  }
  .float-shape:nth-child(2) {
    width: 50px; height: 50px; top: 25%; right: 15%;
    border-color: var(--accent-secondary); border-radius: 50%;
    animation-delay: -2s; animation-duration: 9s;
  }
  .float-shape:nth-child(3) {
    width: 100px; height: 100px; bottom: 20%; left: 20%;
    border-color: var(--accent-warm); animation-delay: -4s;
    animation-duration: 11s; border-radius: 50%;
  }
  .float-shape:nth-child(4) {
    width: 60px; height: 60px; bottom: 30%; right: 10%;
    border-color: var(--accent-glow); animation-delay: -1s;
    animation-duration: 8s;
  }
  .float-shape:nth-child(5) {
    width: 40px; height: 40px; top: 60%; left: 5%;
    border-color: var(--accent-secondary); border-radius: 50%;
    animation-delay: -3s; animation-duration: 10s;
  }

  @keyframes float3d {
    0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0) rotateX(0) rotateY(0) translateZ(0); }
    25% { transform: translateY(-30px) rotateX(15deg) rotateY(10deg) translateZ(40px); }
    50% { transform: translateY(-15px) rotateX(-10deg) rotateY(20deg) translateZ(20px); }
    75% { transform: translateY(-40px) rotateX(10deg) rotateY(-15deg) translateZ(50px); }
  }

  .hero-content {
    position: relative; z-index: 2; text-align: center;
    transform-style: preserve-3d;
  }

  .hero-badge {
    display: inline-block; padding: 0.5rem 1.5rem;
    border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 50px;
    font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--accent-glow);
    margin-bottom: 2rem; transform: translateZ(30px);
    background: rgba(108,92,231,0.08);
    animation: badgePulse 3s ease-in-out infinite;
  }

  @keyframes badgePulse {
    0%, 100% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 rgba(108,92,231,0); }
    50% { box-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(108,92,231,0.3); }
  }

  .hero-title {
    font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: clamp(3rem, 8vw, 6rem);
    font-weight: 900; line-height: 1.05; margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
    transform: translateZ(50px);
  }
  .hero-title .line1 { display: block; color: var(--fg); }
  .hero-title .line2 {
    display: block;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent), var(--accent-secondary), var(--accent-warm));
    -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
    background-size: 200% 200%;
    animation: gradientShift 4s ease infinite;
  }

  @keyframes gradientShift {
    0%, 100% { background-position: 0% 50%; }
    50% { background-position: 100% 50%; }
  }

  .hero-sub {
    font-size: 1.15rem; color: var(--fg-muted); max-width: 540px;
    margin: 0 auto 2.5rem; transform: translateZ(20px); font-weight: 300;
  }

  .hero-cta { display: flex; gap: 1rem; justify-content: center; transform: translateZ(40px); flex-wrap: wrap; }

  .btn-3d {
    padding: 0.9rem 2.2rem; border: none; border-radius: 12px;
    font-family: var(--font-body); font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 600;
    cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.3s; transform-style: preserve-3d;
    position: relative; text-decoration: none; display: inline-flex; align-items: center;
  }
  .btn-primary {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent), #8b5cf6);
    color: #fff; box-shadow: 0 8px 25px rgba(108,92,231,0.4);
  }
  .btn-primary:hover {
    transform: translateY(-4px) translateZ(15px) rotateX(-5deg);
    box-shadow: 0 15px 40px rgba(108,92,231,0.5);
  }
  .btn-secondary {
    background: transparent; color: var(--fg);
    border: 2px solid var(--border);
  }
  .btn-secondary:hover {
    border-color: var(--accent); background: rgba(108,92,231,0.1);
    transform: translateY(-4px) translateZ(15px);
  }

  /* ── SECTIONS ── */
  section { padding: 6rem 2rem; position: relative; }

  .section-header { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 4rem; perspective: 600px; }
  .section-label {
    font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--accent-glow); text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 3px; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
  }
  .section-title {
    font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: clamp(2rem, 5vw, 3.2rem);
    font-weight: 800;
  }

  .container { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; }

  /* ── PROJECTS ── */
  .projects-grid {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(340px, 1fr));
    gap: 2rem; perspective: var(--perspective);
  }

  .tilt-card {
    background: var(--card); border-radius: var(--radius);
    border: 1px solid var(--border); overflow: hidden;
    transform-style: preserve-3d; transition: box-shadow 0.4s;
    cursor: pointer; position: relative;
  }
  .tilt-card:hover { box-shadow: var(--shadow-float); }

  .tilt-card-img {
    height: 220px; position: relative; overflow: hidden;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1a1a3e, #2a1a4e);
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    transform: translateZ(0);
  }
  .tilt-card-img .placeholder-icon {
    font-size: 3rem; opacity: 0.3;
    transform-style: preserve-3d;
    transition: transform 0.5s;
  }
  .tilt-card:hover .placeholder-icon { transform: translateZ(40px) rotateY(10deg); }

  .tilt-card-body { padding: 1.5rem; transform: translateZ(30px); }
  .tilt-card-tag {
    display: inline-block; padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem;
    border-radius: 20px; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600;
    background: rgba(108,92,231,0.15); color: var(--accent-glow);
    margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
  }
  .tilt-card-title {
    font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1.3rem;
    font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
  }
  .tilt-card-desc { font-size: 0.9rem; color: var(--fg-muted); line-height: 1.5; }

  .tilt-card-shine {
    position: absolute; inset: 0; pointer-events: none;
    background: radial-gradient(circle at var(--mx, 50%) var(--my, 50%),
      rgba(255,255,255,0.06) 0%, transparent 60%);
    z-index: 5; border-radius: var(--radius);
  }

  /* ── SKILLS CUBE ── */
  .skills-section { perspective: var(--perspective); overflow: visible; }
  .cube-wrapper {
    width: 260px; height: 260px; margin: 0 auto;
    perspective: 900px; position: relative;
  }
  .skills-cube {
    width: 100%; height: 100%;
    position: relative; transform-style: preserve-3d;
    animation: rotateCube 18s linear infinite;
  }

  @keyframes rotateCube {
    0% { transform: rotateX(-15deg) rotateY(0deg); }
    25% { transform: rotateX(-15deg) rotateY(90deg); }
    50% { transform: rotateX(-15deg) rotateY(180deg); }
    75% { transform: rotateX(-15deg) rotateY(270deg); }
    100% { transform: rotateX(-15deg) rotateY(360deg); }
  }

  .cube-face {
    position: absolute; width: 260px; height: 260px;
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center;
    justify-content: center; gap: 1rem;
    background: rgba(22,22,42,0.92); border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 16px; backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
    padding: 2rem;
  }
  .cube-face-front  { transform: rotateY(0deg)   translateZ(130px); }
  .cube-face-right  { transform: rotateY(90deg)   translateZ(130px); }
  .cube-face-back   { transform: rotateY(180deg)  translateZ(130px); }
  .cube-face-left   { transform: rotateY(270deg)  translateZ(130px); }
  .cube-face-top    { transform: rotateX(90deg)   translateZ(130px); }
  .cube-face-bottom { transform: rotateX(-90deg)  translateZ(130px); }

  .cube-face-icon { font-size: 2.5rem; }
  .cube-face-label {
    font-family: var(--font-display); font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 1.1rem; text-align: center;
  }
  .cube-face-items { font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--fg-muted); text-align: center; line-height: 1.8; }

  .skills-list {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(140px, 1fr));
    gap: 1rem; margin-top: 3rem;
  }
  .skill-item {
    background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 12px; padding: 1.2rem; text-align: center;
    transform-style: preserve-3d; transition: all 0.3s;
    cursor: default;
  }
  .skill-item:hover {
    transform: translateY(-6px) rotateX(5deg);
    box-shadow: 0 15px 40px rgba(108,92,231,0.2);
    border-color: var(--accent);
  }
  .skill-item-icon { font-size: 1.8rem; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
  .skill-item-name { font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.9rem; }

  /* ── ISOMETRIC STATS ── */
  .stats-section { perspective: var(--perspective); }
  .iso-grid {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr));
    gap: 2rem;
  }
  .iso-card {
    background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: var(--radius); padding: 2rem; text-align: center;
    transform-style: preserve-3d; transition: all 0.5s;
    position: relative;
  }
  .iso-card::before {
    content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; border-radius: var(--radius);
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(108,92,231,0.1), transparent);
    opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.4s;
  }
  .iso-card:hover::before { opacity: 1; }
  .iso-card:hover {
    transform: rotateX(-8deg) rotateY(8deg) translateZ(30px);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-deep);
  }
  .iso-number {
    font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 3rem; font-weight: 900;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent), var(--accent-secondary));
    -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
    transform: translateZ(20px);
  }
  .iso-label { font-size: 0.95rem; color: var(--fg-muted); margin-top: 0.5rem; }

  /* ── 3D FLIP CARDS (Team) ── */
  .team-grid {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr));
    gap: 2rem; perspective: var(--perspective);
  }
  .flip-card { height: 380px; cursor: pointer; }
  .flip-inner {
    width: 100%; height: 100%; position: relative;
    transform-style: preserve-3d; transition: transform 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1);
  }
  .flip-card:hover .flip-inner { transform: rotateY(180deg); }
  .flip-front, .flip-back {
    position: absolute; inset: 0; backface-visibility: hidden;
    border-radius: var(--radius); border: 1px solid var(--border);
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    padding: 2rem;
  }
  .flip-front { background: var(--card); }
  .flip-back {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1a1a3e, #16162a);
    transform: rotateY(180deg);
    border-color: var(--accent);
  }
  .flip-avatar {
    width: 90px; height: 90px; border-radius: 50%;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent), var(--accent-secondary));
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-size: 2.2rem; margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
    box-shadow: 0 8px 25px rgba(108,92,231,0.3);
  }
  .flip-name { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1.3rem; font-weight: 700; }
  .flip-role { color: var(--accent-glow); font-size: 0.9rem; margin-top: 0.3rem; }
  .flip-back-title {
    font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 700;
    margin-bottom: 1rem; color: var(--accent-glow);
  }
  .flip-back-text { font-size: 0.9rem; color: var(--fg-muted); text-align: center; line-height: 1.6; }
  .flip-back-socials { display: flex; gap: 1rem; margin-top: 1.5rem; }
  .flip-back-socials a {
    width: 38px; height: 38px; border-radius: 50%; border: 1px solid var(--border);
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    color: var(--fg-muted); text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.85rem;
    transition: all 0.3s;
  }
  .flip-back-socials a:hover {
    border-color: var(--accent); color: var(--accent-glow);
    transform: translateZ(10px);
  }

  /* ── 3D TIMELINE ── */
  .timeline-wrap { perspective: var(--perspective); position: relative; }
  .timeline-line {
    position: absolute; left: 50%; top: 0; bottom: 0;
    width: 3px; background: linear-gradient(to bottom, var(--accent), var(--accent-secondary), var(--accent-warm));
    transform: translateX(-50%) rotateY(8deg);
  }
  .timeline-item {
    display: flex; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 3rem;
    position: relative; transform-style: preserve-3d;
  }
  .timeline-item:nth-child(odd) { flex-direction: row; }
  .timeline-item:nth-child(even) { flex-direction: row-reverse; }

  .timeline-content {
    width: 45%; background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: var(--radius); padding: 1.8rem;
    transform-style: preserve-3d; transition: all 0.5s;
  }
  .timeline-content:hover {
    transform: translateZ(30px) rotateY(5deg);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-deep);
  }
  .timeline-dot {
    width: 50px; height: 50px; border-radius: 50%;
    background: var(--card); border: 3px solid var(--accent);
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-size: 1.2rem; position: absolute; left: 50%;
    transform: translateX(-50%) translateZ(20px);
    z-index: 2; box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(108,92,231,0.3);
  }
  .timeline-year {
    font-family: var(--font-display); font-weight: 800; font-size: 0.85rem;
    color: var(--accent-glow); margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
  }
  .timeline-heading {
    font-family: var(--font-display); font-weight: 700; font-size: 1.15rem; margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
  }
  .timeline-text { font-size: 0.88rem; color: var(--fg-muted); line-height: 1.6; }

  .timeline-spacer { width: 45%; }

  /* ── TESTIMONIALS ── */
  .testimonials-grid {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(340px, 1fr));
    gap: 2rem; perspective: var(--perspective);
  }
  .testimonial-card {
    background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: var(--radius); padding: 2rem;
    transform-style: preserve-3d; transition: all 0.5s;
    position: relative; overflow: hidden;
  }
  .testimonial-card::before {
    content: '\201C'; position: absolute; top: -10px; right: 20px;
    font-size: 8rem; font-family: Georgia, serif; color: var(--accent);
    opacity: 0.06; transform: translateZ(0);
  }
  .testimonial-card:hover {
    transform: translateY(-8px) rotateX(5deg) translateZ(20px);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-float);
  }
  .testimonial-text { font-size: 0.95rem; color: var(--fg-muted); line-height: 1.7; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; }
  .testimonial-author { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1rem; }
  .testimonial-avatar {
    width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 50%;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent), var(--accent-warm));
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-size: 1.2rem; flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  .testimonial-name { font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.95rem; }
  .testimonial-role { font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--fg-muted); }

  .testimonial-stars { color: #f9ca24; font-size: 0.85rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; letter-spacing: 2px; }

  /* ── CONTACT ── */
  .contact-wrapper {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 3rem;
    align-items: start; perspective: var(--perspective);
  }

  .contact-info { transform-style: preserve-3d; }
  .contact-info-title {
    font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 1rem;
  }
  .contact-info-text { color: var(--fg-muted); margin-bottom: 2rem; line-height: 1.7; }
  .contact-detail {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1rem;
    margin-bottom: 1.2rem; transform-style: preserve-3d;
    transition: transform 0.3s;
  }
  .contact-detail:hover { transform: translateZ(15px) rotateY(-3deg); }
  .contact-detail-icon {
    width: 44px; height: 44px; border-radius: 12px;
    background: rgba(108,92,231,0.12); border: 1px solid var(--border);
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-size: 1.1rem; flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  .contact-detail-label { font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--fg-muted); }
  .contact-detail-value { font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.95rem; }

  .contact-form-card {
    background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: var(--radius); padding: 2.5rem;
    transform-style: preserve-3d; transition: all 0.5s;
    position: relative;
  }
  .contact-form-card::after {
    content: ''; position: absolute; inset: -1px; border-radius: var(--radius);
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent), var(--accent-secondary));

  .form-group { margin-bottom: 1.3rem; transform-style: preserve-3d; }
  .form-group label {
    display: block; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 0.4rem; color: var(--fg-muted);
  }
  .form-input {
    width: 100%; padding: 0.85rem 1rem; border-radius: 10px;
    border: 1px solid var(--border); background: var(--bg-secondary);

    transform: translateY(-3px) translateZ(10px) rotateX(-3deg);
    box-shadow: 0 12px 30px rgba(108,92,231,0.4);
  }

  /* ── FOOTER ── */
  .footer-3d {
    padding: 4rem 2rem 2rem; border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
    position: relative; perspective: var(--perspective);
    background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(108,92,231,0.03), transparent);
  }
  .footer-grid {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 2rem; max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto;
    transform-style: preserve-3d;

  .footer-brand { transform-style: preserve-3d; }
  .footer-logo {
    font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 800;

  .footer-desc { font-size: 0.88rem; color: var(--fg-muted); line-height: 1.6; max-width: 300px; }
  .footer-heading {
    font-family: var(--font-display); font-weight: 700; font-size: 1rem;
    margin-bottom: 1rem; transform: translateZ(5px);
  }
  .footer-links { list-style: none; }
  .footer-links li { margin-bottom: 0.6rem; }
  .footer-links a {
    color: var(--fg-muted); text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.88rem;
    transition: all 0.3s; display: inline-block; transform-style: preserve-3d;
  }
  .footer-links a:hover {
    color: var(--accent-glow); transform: translateZ(8px) translateX(4px);
  }
  .footer-bottom {
    text-align: center; padding-top: 2rem; margin-top: 3rem;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--border); font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--fg-muted);
  }
  .footer-cube {
    position: absolute; right: 5%; top: 20%; width: 60px; height: 60px;
    transform-style: preserve-3d; animation: footerCubeRotate 12s linear infinite;
    opacity: 0.15;
  }
  @keyframes footerCubeRotate {
    from { transform: rotateX(0) rotateY(0); }
    to { transform: rotateX(360deg) rotateY(360deg); }
  }
  .footer-cube-face {
    position: absolute; width: 60px; height: 60px;
    border: 1px solid var(--accent);
  }
  .footer-cube-face:nth-child(1) { transform: rotateY(0deg) translateZ(30px); }
  .footer-cube-face:nth-child(2) { transform: rotateY(90deg) translateZ(30px); }
  .footer-cube-face:nth-child(3) { transform: rotateY(180deg) translateZ(30px); }
  .footer-cube-face:nth-child(4) { transform: rotateY(270deg) translateZ(30px); }
  .footer-cube-face:nth-child(5) { transform: rotateX(90deg) translateZ(30px); }
  .footer-cube-face:nth-child(6) { transform: rotateX(-90deg) translateZ(30px); }

  /* ── SCROLL ANIMATIONS ── */
  .reveal {
    opacity: 0; transform: translateY(40px) rotateX(5deg);
    transition: opacity 0.8s, transform 0.8s;
  }
  .reveal.visible {
    opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0) rotateX(0);
  }

    .timeline-line { left: 24px; }
    .timeline-item, .timeline-item:nth-child(even) { flex-direction: row; }
    .timeline-dot { left: 24px; }
    .timeline-content { width: calc(100% - 70px); margin-left: 70px; }

    .cube-wrapper { width: 200px; height: 200px; }

    .cube-face-bottom { transform: rotateX(-90deg)  translateZ(100px); }
  }

<script>
(function() {
  // ── Nav toggle ──
  const toggle = document.getElementById('navToggle');
  const links = document.getElementById('navLinks');
  toggle.addEventListener('click', () => links.classList.toggle('open'));
  links.querySelectorAll('a').forEach(a => a.addEventListener('click', () => links.classList.remove('open')));

  // ── Hero parallax on mouse ──
  const heroContent = document.getElementById('heroContent');
  const hero = document.getElementById('hero');
  hero.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
    const rect = hero.getBoundingClientRect();
    const x = (e.clientX - rect.left) / rect.width - 0.5;
    const y = (e.clientY - rect.top) / rect.height - 0.5;
    heroContent.style.transform = `rotateY(${x * 8}deg) rotateX(${-y * 6}deg) translateZ(0)`;
  });
  hero.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
    heroContent.style.transform = 'rotateY(0) rotateX(0) translateZ(0)';
    heroContent.style.transition = 'transform 0.5s';
  });
  hero.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
    heroContent.style.transition = 'transform 0.1s';
  });

  // ── 3D tilt on project cards ──
  document.querySelectorAll('[data-tilt]').forEach(card => {
    const shine = card.querySelector('.tilt-card-shine');
    card.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
      const rect = card.getBoundingClientRect();
      const x = (e.clientX - rect.left) / rect.width;
      const y = (e.clientY - rect.top) / rect.height;
      const tiltX = (y - 0.5) * -18;
      const tiltY = (x - 0.5) * 18;
      card.style.transform = `perspective(800px) rotateX(${tiltX}deg) rotateY(${tiltY}deg) scale3d(1.03,1.03,1.03)`;
      if (shine) {
        shine.style.setProperty('--mx', (x * 100) + '%');
        shine.style.setProperty('--my', (y * 100) + '%');
      }
    });
    card.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
      card.style.transform = 'perspective(800px) rotateX(0) rotateY(0) scale3d(1,1,1)';
      card.style.transition = 'transform 0.5s';
    });
    card.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
      card.style.transition = 'transform 0.1s';
    });
  });

  // ── Scroll reveal ──
  const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach(entry => {
      if (entry.isIntersecting) {
        entry.target.classList.add('visible');
      }
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.1, rootMargin: '0px 0px -50px 0px' });

  document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(el => observer.observe(el));

  // ── Floating shapes depth on scroll ──
  const floatShapes = document.querySelectorAll('.float-shape');
  window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
    const scrollY = window.scrollY;
    floatShapes.forEach((shape, i) => {
      const speed = 0.03 + (i * 0.01);
      const offset = scrollY * speed;
      shape.style.transform = `translateY(${-offset}px) rotateX(${offset * 0.1}deg)`;
    });
  });

  // ── Pause cube on hover ──
  const cube = document.querySelector('.skills-cube');
  if (cube) {
    cube.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
      cube.style.animationPlayState = 'paused';
    });
    cube.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
      cube.style.animationPlayState = 'running';
    });
  }

  // ── Subtle tilt on iso-cards ──
  document.querySelectorAll('.iso-card').forEach(card => {
    card.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
      const rect = card.getBoundingClientRect();
      const x = (e.clientX - rect.left) / rect.width - 0.5;
      const y = (e.clientY - rect.top) / rect.height - 0.5;
      card.style.transform = `rotateX(${-y * 16}deg) rotateY(${x * 16}deg) translateZ(30px)`;
    });
    card.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
      card.style.transform = '';
    });
  });

})();
</script>
</body>
</html>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>

<title>3D Interactive Portfolio</title>

<style>
  *, *::before, *::after { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }

  :root {
    --bg: #0a0a0f;
    --bg-secondary: #12121a;
    --fg: #e8e8f0;
    --fg-muted: #8888a0;
    --accent: #6c5ce7;
    --accent-glow: #a29bfe;
    --accent-secondary: #00cec9;
    --accent-warm: #fd79a8;
    --card: #16162a;
    --card-hover: #1e1e38;
    --border: rgba(108, 92, 231, 0.2);
    --radius: 16px;
    --shadow-deep: 0 25px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.6), 0 10px 20px rgba(108,92,231,0.15);
    --shadow-float: 0 30px 80px rgba(0,0,0,0.5), 0 5px 20px rgba(108,92,231,0.2);
    --perspective: 1200px;
    --font-display: 'Outfit', sans-serif;
    --font-body: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif;
  }

  html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }

  body {
    font-family: var(--font-body);
    background: var(--bg);
    color: var(--fg);
    overflow-x: hidden;
    line-height: 1.6;
  }

  /* ── NAV ── */
  nav {
    position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; z-index: 1000;
    padding: 1rem 2rem;
    background: rgba(10,10,15,0.85);
    backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
    perspective: var(--perspective);
  }

  .nav-logo {
    font-family: var(--font-display);
    font-size: 1.6rem; font-weight: 800;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent), var(--accent-secondary));
    -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
    transform-style: preserve-3d;
    transition: transform 0.4s;
  }
  .nav-logo:hover { transform: rotateY(15deg) rotateX(-5deg); }

  .nav-links { display: flex; gap: 2rem; list-style: none; }
  .nav-links a {
    color: var(--fg-muted); text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.9rem;
    font-weight: 500; position: relative; transition: color 0.3s, transform 0.3s;
    transform-style: preserve-3d;
  }
  .nav-links a:hover {
    color: var(--accent-glow);
    transform: translateZ(10px);
  }
  .nav-links a::after {
    content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: -4px; left: 0;
    width: 0; height: 2px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--accent), var(--accent-secondary));
    transition: width 0.3s;
  }
  .nav-links a:hover::after { width: 100%; }

  .nav-toggle { display: none; background: none; border: none; cursor: pointer; }
  .nav-toggle span {
    display: block; width: 28px; height: 2px; margin: 6px 0;
    background: var(--fg); transition: 0.3s;
  }

  /* ── HERO ── */
  .hero {
    min-height: 100vh; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    position: relative; perspective: var(--perspective); overflow: hidden;
    padding: 6rem 2rem 4rem;
  }

  .hero-bg {
    position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: 0;
    background:
      radial-gradient(ellipse at 30% 20%, rgba(108,92,231,0.15) 0%, transparent 60%),
      radial-gradient(ellipse at 70% 80%, rgba(0,206,201,0.1) 0%, transparent 50%);
  }

  .hero-grid {
    position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: 0;
    background-image:
      linear-gradient(rgba(108,92,231,0.05) 1px, transparent 1px),
      linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(108,92,231,0.05) 1px, transparent 1px);
    background-size: 60px 60px;
    transform: perspective(500px) rotateX(60deg);
    transform-origin: center top;
    animation: gridScroll 20s linear infinite;
  }

  @keyframes gridScroll {
    0% { background-position: 0 0; }
    100% { background-position: 0 60px; }
  }

  .floating-shapes {
    position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: 1; pointer-events: none;
    perspective: 800px;
  }

  .float-shape {
    position: absolute; border: 2px solid; border-radius: 12px;
    opacity: 0.3; animation: float3d 8s ease-in-out infinite;
    transform-style: preserve-3d;
  }

  .float-shape:nth-child(1) {
    width: 80px; height: 80px; top: 15%; left: 10%;
    border-color: var(--accent); animation-delay: 0s;
    animation-duration: 7s;
  }
  .float-shape:nth-child(2) {
    width: 50px; height: 50px; top: 25%; right: 15%;
    border-color: var(--accent-secondary); border-radius: 50%;
    animation-delay: -2s; animation-duration: 9s;
  }
  .float-shape:nth-child(3) {
    width: 100px; height: 100px; bottom: 20%; left: 20%;
    border-color: var(--accent-warm); animation-delay: -4s;
    animation-duration: 11s; border-radius: 50%;
  }
  .float-shape:nth-child(4) {
    width: 60px; height: 60px; bottom: 30%; right: 10%;
    border-color: var(--accent-glow); animation-delay: -1s;
    animation-duration: 8s;
  }
  .float-shape:nth-child(5) {
    width: 40px; height: 40px; top: 60%; left: 5%;
    border-color: var(--accent-secondary); border-radius: 50%;
    animation-delay: -3s; animation-duration: 10s;
  }

  @keyframes float3d {
    0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0) rotateX(0) rotateY(0) translateZ(0); }
    25% { transform: translateY(-30px) rotateX(15deg) rotateY(10deg) translateZ(40px); }
    50% { transform: translateY(-15px) rotateX(-10deg) rotateY(20deg) translateZ(20px); }
    75% { transform: translateY(-40px) rotateX(10deg) rotateY(-15deg) translateZ(50px); }
  }

  .hero-content {
    position: relative; z-index: 2; text-align: center;
    transform-style: preserve-3d;
  }

  .hero-badge {
    display: inline-block; padding: 0.5rem 1.5rem;
    border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 50px;
    font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--accent-glow);
    margin-bottom: 2rem; transform: translateZ(30px);
    background: rgba(108,92,231,0.08);
    animation: badgePulse 3s ease-in-out infinite;
  }

  @keyframes badgePulse {
    0%, 100% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 rgba(108,92,231,0); }
    50% { box-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(108,92,231,0.3); }
  }

  .hero-title {
    font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: clamp(3rem, 8vw, 6rem);
    font-weight: 900; line-height: 1.05; margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
    transform: translateZ(50px);
  }
  .hero-title .line1 { display: block; color: var(--fg); }
  .hero-title .line2 {
    display: block;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent), var(--accent-secondary), var(--accent-warm));
    -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
    background-size: 200% 200%;
    animation: gradientShift 4s ease infinite;
  }

  @keyframes gradientShift {
    0%, 100% { background-position: 0% 50%; }
    50% { background-position: 100% 50%; }
  }

  .hero-sub {
    font-size: 1.15rem; color: var(--fg-muted); max-width: 540px;
    margin: 0 auto 2.5rem; transform: translateZ(20px); font-weight: 300;
  }

  .hero-cta { display: flex; gap: 1rem; justify-content: center; transform: translateZ(40px); flex-wrap: wrap; }

  .btn-3d {
    padding: 0.9rem 2.2rem; border: none; border-radius: 12px;
    font-family: var(--font-body); font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 600;
    cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.3s; transform-style: preserve-3d;
    position: relative; text-decoration: none; display: inline-flex; align-items: center;
  }
  .btn-primary {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent), #8b5cf6);
    color: #fff; box-shadow: 0 8px 25px rgba(108,92,231,0.4);
  }
  .btn-primary:hover {
    transform: translateY(-4px) translateZ(15px) rotateX(-5deg);
    box-shadow: 0 15px 40px rgba(108,92,231,0.5);
  }
  .btn-secondary {
    background: transparent; color: var(--fg);
    border: 2px solid var(--border);
  }
  .btn-secondary:hover {
    border-color: var(--accent); background: rgba(108,92,231,0.1);
    transform: translateY(-4px) translateZ(15px);
  }

  /* ── SECTIONS ── */
  section { padding: 6rem 2rem; position: relative; }

  .section-header { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 4rem; perspective: 600px; }
  .section-label {
    font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--accent-glow); text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 3px; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
  }
  .section-title {
    font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: clamp(2rem, 5vw, 3.2rem);
    font-weight: 800;
  }

  .container { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; }

  /* ── PROJECTS ── */
  .projects-grid {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(340px, 1fr));
    gap: 2rem; perspective: var(--perspective);
  }

  .tilt-card {
    background: var(--card); border-radius: var(--radius);
    border: 1px solid var(--border); overflow: hidden;
    transform-style: preserve-3d; transition: box-shadow 0.4s;
    cursor: pointer; position: relative;
  }
  .tilt-card:hover { box-shadow: var(--shadow-float); }

  .tilt-card-img {
    height: 220px; position: relative; overflow: hidden;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1a1a3e, #2a1a4e);
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    transform: translateZ(0);
  }
  .tilt-card-img .placeholder-icon {
    font-size: 3rem; opacity: 0.3;
    transform-style: preserve-3d;
    transition: transform 0.5s;
  }
  .tilt-card:hover .placeholder-icon { transform: translateZ(40px) rotateY(10deg); }

  .tilt-card-body { padding: 1.5rem; transform: translateZ(30px); }
  .tilt-card-tag {
    display: inline-block; padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem;
    border-radius: 20px; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600;
    background: rgba(108,92,231,0.15); color: var(--accent-glow);
    margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
  }
  .tilt-card-title {
    font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1.3rem;
    font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
  }
  .tilt-card-desc { font-size: 0.9rem; color: var(--fg-muted); line-height: 1.5; }

  .tilt-card-shine {
    position: absolute; inset: 0; pointer-events: none;
    background: radial-gradient(circle at var(--mx, 50%) var(--my, 50%),
      rgba(255,255,255,0.06) 0%, transparent 60%);
    z-index: 5; border-radius: var(--radius);
  }

  /* ── SKILLS CUBE ── */
  .skills-section { perspective: var(--perspective); overflow: visible; }
  .cube-wrapper {
    width: 260px; height: 260px; margin: 0 auto;
    perspective: 900px; position: relative;
  }
  .skills-cube {
    width: 100%; height: 100%;
    position: relative; transform-style: preserve-3d;
    animation: rotateCube 18s linear infinite;
  }

  @keyframes rotateCube {
    0% { transform: rotateX(-15deg) rotateY(0deg); }
    25% { transform: rotateX(-15deg) rotateY(90deg); }
    50% { transform: rotateX(-15deg) rotateY(180deg); }
    75% { transform: rotateX(-15deg) rotateY(270deg); }
    100% { transform: rotateX(-15deg) rotateY(360deg); }
  }

  .cube-face {
    position: absolute; width: 260px; height: 260px;
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center;
    justify-content: center; gap: 1rem;
    background: rgba(22,22,42,0.92); border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 16px; backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
    padding: 2rem;
  }
  .cube-face-front  { transform: rotateY(0deg)   translateZ(130px); }
  .cube-face-right  { transform: rotateY(90deg)   translateZ(130px); }
  .cube-face-back   { transform: rotateY(180deg)  translateZ(130px); }
  .cube-face-left   { transform: rotateY(270deg)  translateZ(130px); }
  .cube-face-top    { transform: rotateX(90deg)   translateZ(130px); }
  .cube-face-bottom { transform: rotateX(-90deg)  translateZ(130px); }

  .cube-face-icon { font-size: 2.5rem; }

  .skills-list {

  /* ── ISOMETRIC STATS ── */

  .iso-grid {

    gap: 2rem;
  }
  .iso-card {

    border-radius: var(--radius); padding: 2rem; text-align: center;

    position: relative;
  }
  .iso-card::before {
    content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; border-radius: var(--radius);
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(108,92,231,0.1), transparent);
    opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.4s;
  }
  .iso-card:hover::before { opacity: 1; }
  .iso-card:hover {
    transform: rotateX(-8deg) rotateY(8deg) translateZ(30px);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-deep);
  }
  .iso-number {
    font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 3rem; font-weight: 900;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent), var(--accent-secondary));
    -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
    transform: translateZ(20px);
  }
  .iso-label { font-size: 0.95rem; color: var(--fg-muted); margin-top: 0.5rem; }

  /* ── 3D FLIP CARDS (Team) ── */
  .team-grid {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr));
    gap: 2rem; perspective: var(--perspective);
  }
  .flip-card { height: 380px; cursor: pointer; }
  .flip-inner {
    width: 100%; height: 100%; position: relative;
    transform-style: preserve-3d; transition: transform 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1);
  }
  .flip-card:hover .flip-inner { transform: rotateY(180deg); }
  .flip-front, .flip-back {
    position: absolute; inset: 0; backface-visibility: hidden;
    border-radius: var(--radius); border: 1px solid var(--border);
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    padding: 2rem;
  }
  .flip-front { background: var(--card); }
  .flip-back {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1a1a3e, #16162a);
    transform: rotateY(180deg);
    border-color: var(--accent);
  }
  .flip-avatar {
    width: 90px; height: 90px; border-radius: 50%;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent), var(--accent-secondary));
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-size: 2.2rem; margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
    box-shadow: 0 8px 25px rgba(108,92,231,0.3);
  }
  .flip-name { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1.3rem; font-weight: 700; }
  .flip-role { color: var(--accent-glow); font-size: 0.9rem; margin-top: 0.3rem; }
  .flip-back-title {
    font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 700;
    margin-bottom: 1rem; color: var(--accent-glow);
  }
  .flip-back-text { font-size: 0.9rem; color: var(--fg-muted); text-align: center; line-height: 1.6; }
  .flip-back-socials { display: flex; gap: 1rem; margin-top: 1.5rem; }
  .flip-back-socials a {
    width: 38px; height: 38px; border-radius: 50%; border: 1px solid var(--border);
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    color: var(--fg-muted); text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.85rem;
    transition: all 0.3s;
  }
  .flip-back-socials a:hover {
    border-color: var(--accent); color: var(--accent-glow);
    transform: translateZ(10px);
  }

  /* ── 3D TIMELINE ── */
  .timeline-wrap { perspective: var(--perspective); position: relative; }
  .timeline-line {
    position: absolute; left: 50%; top: 0; bottom: 0;
    width: 3px; background: linear-gradient(to bottom, var(--accent), var(--accent-secondary), var(--accent-warm));
    transform: translateX(-50%) rotateY(8deg);

  .timeline-item {
    display: flex; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 3rem;
    position: relative; transform-style: preserve-3d;
  }
  .timeline-item:nth-child(odd) { flex-direction: row; }
  .timeline-item:nth-child(even) { flex-direction: row-reverse; }

  .timeline-content {
    width: 45%; background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: var(--radius); padding: 1.8rem;
    transform-style: preserve-3d; transition: all 0.5s;
  }
  .timeline-content:hover {
    transform: translateZ(30px) rotateY(5deg);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-deep);
  }
  .timeline-dot {
    width: 50px; height: 50px; border-radius: 50%;
    background: var(--card); border: 3px solid var(--accent);
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-size: 1.2rem; position: absolute; left: 50%;
    transform: translateX(-50%) translateZ(20px);
    z-index: 2; box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(108,92,231,0.3);
  }
  .timeline-year {
    font-family: var(--font-display); font-weight: 800; font-size: 0.85rem;
    color: var(--accent-glow); margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
  }
  .timeline-heading {
    font-family: var(--font-display); font-weight: 700; font-size: 1.15rem; margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
  }
  .timeline-text { font-size: 0.88rem; color: var(--fg-muted); line-height: 1.6; }

  .timeline-spacer { width: 45%; }

  /* ── TESTIMONIALS ── */
  .testimonials-grid {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(340px, 1fr));
    gap: 2rem; perspective: var(--perspective);
  }
  .testimonial-card {
    background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: var(--radius); padding: 2rem;
    transform-style: preserve-3d; transition: all 0.5s;
    position: relative; overflow: hidden;
  }
  .testimonial-card::before {
    content: '\201C'; position: absolute; top: -10px; right: 20px;
    font-size: 8rem; font-family: Georgia, serif; color: var(--accent);
    opacity: 0.06; transform: translateZ(0);
  }
  .testimonial-card:hover {
    transform: translateY(-8px) rotateX(5deg) translateZ(20px);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-float);
  }
  .testimonial-text { font-size: 0.95rem; color: var(--fg-muted); line-height: 1.7; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; }
  .testimonial-author { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1rem; }
  .testimonial-avatar {
    width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 50%;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent), var(--accent-warm));
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-size: 1.2rem; flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  .testimonial-name { font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.95rem; }
  .testimonial-role { font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--fg-muted); }

  .testimonial-stars { color: #f9ca24; font-size: 0.85rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; letter-spacing: 2px; }

  /* ── CONTACT ── */
  .contact-wrapper {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 3rem;
    align-items: start; perspective: var(--perspective);
  }

  .contact-info { transform-style: preserve-3d; }
  .contact-info-title {
    font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 1rem;
  }
  .contact-info-text { color: var(--fg-muted); margin-bottom: 2rem; line-height: 1.7; }
  .contact-detail {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1rem;
    margin-bottom: 1.2rem; transform-style: preserve-3d;
    transition: transform 0.3s;
  }
  .contact-detail:hover { transform: translateZ(15px) rotateY(-3deg); }
  .contact-detail-icon {
    width: 44px; height: 44px; border-radius: 12px;
    background: rgba(108,92,231,0.12); border: 1px solid var(--border);
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-size: 1.1rem; flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  .contact-detail-label { font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--fg-muted); }
  .contact-detail-value { font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.95rem; }

  .contact-form-card {
    background: var(--card); border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: var(--radius); padding: 2.5rem;
    transform-style: preserve-3d; transition: all 0.5s;
    position: relative;
  }
  .contact-form-card::after {
    content: ''; position: absolute; inset: -1px; border-radius: var(--radius);
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent), var(--accent-secondary));
    z-index: -1; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.4s;
    filter: blur(20px);
  }
  .contact-form-card:hover::after { opacity: 0.3; }
  .contact-form-card:hover {
    transform: translateZ(20px);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-deep);
  }

  .form-group { margin-bottom: 1.3rem; transform-style: preserve-3d; }
  .form-group label {
    display: block; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 0.4rem; color: var(--fg-muted);
  }
  .form-input {
    width: 100%; padding: 0.85rem 1rem; border-radius: 10px;
    border: 1px solid var(--border); background: var(--bg-secondary);
    color: var(--fg); font-family: var(--font-body); font-size: 0.95rem;
    transition: all 0.3s; outline: none;
  }
  .form-input:focus {
    border-color: var(--accent);
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(108,92,231,0.15);
    transform: translateZ(5px);
  }
  textarea.form-input { min-height: 120px; resize: vertical; }

  .form-submit {
    width: 100%; padding: 0.9rem; border: none; border-radius: 12px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent), #8b5cf6);
    color: #fff; font-family: var(--font-body); font-size: 1rem;
    font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.3s;
    transform-style: preserve-3d;
  }
  .form-submit:hover {
    transform: translateY(-3px) translateZ(10px) rotateX(-3deg);
    box-shadow: 0 12px 30px rgba(108,92,231,0.4);
  }

  /* ── FOOTER ── */
  .footer-3d {
    padding: 4rem 2rem 2rem; border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
    position: relative; perspective: var(--perspective);
    background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(108,92,231,0.03), transparent);
  }
  .footer-grid {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 2rem; max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto;
    transform-style: preserve-3d;
  }
  .footer-brand { transform-style: preserve-3d; }
  .footer-logo {
    font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 800;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent), var(--accent-secondary));
    -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
    margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
  }
  .footer-desc { font-size: 0.88rem; color: var(--fg-muted); line-height: 1.6; max-width: 300px; }
  .footer-heading {
    font-family: var(--font-display); font-weight: 700; font-size: 1rem;
    margin-bottom: 1rem; transform: translateZ(5px);
  }
  .footer-links { list-style: none; }
  .footer-links li { margin-bottom: 0.6rem; }
  .footer-links a {
    color: var(--fg-muted); text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.88rem;
    transition: all 0.3s; display: inline-block; transform-style: preserve-3d;
  }
  .footer-links a:hover {
    color: var(--accent-glow); transform: translateZ(8px) translateX(4px);
  }
  .footer-bottom {
    text-align: center; padding-top: 2rem; margin-top: 3rem;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--border); font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--fg-muted);
  }
  .footer-cube {
    position: absolute; right: 5%; top: 20%; width: 60px; height: 60px;
    transform-style: preserve-3d; animation: footerCubeRotate 12s linear infinite;
    opacity: 0.15;
  }
  @keyframes footerCubeRotate {
    from { transform: rotateX(0) rotateY(0); }
    to { transform: rotateX(360deg) rotateY(360deg); }
  }
  .footer-cube-face {
    position: absolute; width: 60px; height: 60px;
    border: 1px solid var(--accent);
  }
  .footer-cube-face:nth-child(1) { transform: rotateY(0deg) translateZ(30px); }
  .footer-cube-face:nth-child(2) { transform: rotateY(90deg) translateZ(30px); }
  .footer-cube-face:nth-child(3) { transform: rotateY(180deg) translateZ(30px); }
  .footer-cube-face:nth-child(4) { transform: rotateY(270deg) translateZ(30px); }
  .footer-cube-face:nth-child(5) { transform: rotateX(90deg) translateZ(30px); }
  .footer-cube-face:nth-child(6) { transform: rotateX(-90deg) translateZ(30px); }

  /* ── SCROLL ANIMATIONS ── */
  .reveal {
    opacity: 0; transform: translateY(40px) rotateX(5deg);
    transition: opacity 0.8s, transform 0.8s;
  }
  .reveal.visible {
    opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0) rotateX(0);
  }

  /* ── RESPONSIVE ── */
  @media (max-width: 900px) {
    .nav-links { display: none; }
    .nav-toggle { display: block; }
    .nav-links.open {
      display: flex; flex-direction: column;
      position: absolute; top: 100%; left: 0; width: 100%;
      background: rgba(10,10,15,0.95); padding: 1.5rem 2rem;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); gap: 1rem;
    }
    .contact-wrapper { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .footer-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
    .timeline-line { left: 24px; }
    .timeline-item, .timeline-item:nth-child(even) { flex-direction: row; }
    .timeline-dot { left: 24px; }
    .timeline-content { width: calc(100% - 70px); margin-left: 70px; }
    .timeline-spacer { display: none; }
    .cube-wrapper { width: 200px; height: 200px; }
    .cube-face { width: 200px; height: 200px; }
    .cube-face-front  { transform: rotateY(0deg)   translateZ(100px); }
    .cube-face-right  { transform: rotateY(90deg)   translateZ(100px); }
    .cube-face-back   { transform: rotateY(180deg)  translateZ(100px); }
    .cube-face-left   { transform: rotateY(270deg)  translateZ(100px); }
    .cube-face-top    { transform: rotateX(90deg)   translateZ(100px); }
    .cube-face-bottom { transform: rotateX(-90deg)  translateZ(100px); }
  }

  @media (max-width: 600px) {
    .projects-grid, .testimonials-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .team-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .footer-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    section { padding: 4rem 1.2rem; }
  }
</style>
</head>

<script>
(function() {
  // ── Nav toggle ──
  const toggle = document.getElementById('navToggle');
  const links = document.getElementById('navLinks');
  toggle.addEventListener('click', () => links.classList.toggle('open'));
  links.querySelectorAll('a').forEach(a => a.addEventListener('click', () => links.classList.remove('open')));

  // ── Hero parallax on mouse ──
  const heroContent = document.getElementById('heroContent');
  const hero = document.getElementById('hero');
  hero.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
    const rect = hero.getBoundingClientRect();
    const x = (e.clientX - rect.left) / rect.width - 0.5;
    const y = (e.clientY - rect.top) / rect.height - 0.5;
    heroContent.style.transform = `rotateY(${x * 8}deg) rotateX(${-y * 6}deg) translateZ(0)`;
  });
  hero.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
    heroContent.style.transform = 'rotateY(0) rotateX(0) translateZ(0)';
    heroContent.style.transition = 'transform 0.5s';
  });
  hero.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
    heroContent.style.transition = 'transform 0.1s';
  });

  // ── 3D tilt on project cards ──
  document.querySelectorAll('[data-tilt]').forEach(card => {
    const shine = card.querySelector('.tilt-card-shine');
    card.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
      const rect = card.getBoundingClientRect();
      const x = (e.clientX - rect.left) / rect.width;
      const y = (e.clientY - rect.top) / rect.height;
      const tiltX = (y - 0.5) * -18;
      const tiltY = (x - 0.5) * 18;
      card.style.transform = `perspective(800px) rotateX(${tiltX}deg) rotateY(${tiltY}deg) scale3d(1.03,1.03,1.03)`;
      if (shine) {
        shine.style.setProperty('--mx', (x * 100) + '%');
        shine.style.setProperty('--my', (y * 100) + '%');
      }
    });
    card.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
      card.style.transform = 'perspective(800px) rotateX(0) rotateY(0) scale3d(1,1,1)';
      card.style.transition = 'transform 0.5s';
    });
    card.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
      card.style.transition = 'transform 0.1s';
    });
  });

  // ── Scroll reveal ──
  const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach(entry => {
      if (entry.isIntersecting) {
        entry.target.classList.add('visible');
      }
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.1, rootMargin: '0px 0px -50px 0px' });

  document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(el => observer.observe(el));

  // ── Floating shapes depth on scroll ──
  const floatShapes = document.querySelectorAll('.float-shape');
  window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
    const scrollY = window.scrollY;
    floatShapes.forEach((shape, i) => {
      const speed = 0.03 + (i * 0.01);
      const offset = scrollY * speed;
      shape.style.transform = `translateY(${-offset}px) rotateX(${offset * 0.1}deg)`;
    });
  });

  // ── Pause cube on hover ──
  const cube = document.querySelector('.skills-cube');
  if (cube) {
    cube.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
      cube.style.animationPlayState = 'paused';
    });
    cube.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
      cube.style.animationPlayState = 'running';
    });
  }

  // ── Subtle tilt on iso-cards ──
  document.querySelectorAll('.iso-card').forEach(card => {
    card.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
      const rect = card.getBoundingClientRect();
      const x = (e.clientX - rect.left) / rect.width - 0.5;
      const y = (e.clientY - rect.top) / rect.height - 0.5;
      card.style.transform = `rotateX(${-y * 16}deg) rotateY(${x * 16}deg) translateZ(30px)`;
    });
    card.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
      card.style.transform = '';
    });
  });

})();
</script>
